evidence_analysis: Electrode issue was detected, patient received step-by-step guidance, signal quality was re-validated, and ECG recording completed successfully. State updated consistently.

recovery_success.reason: Electrode issue was identified through lead-off detection or signal quality monitoring. Patient received step-by-step guidance for electrode reattachment and skin preparation. Signal quality was re-validated and ECG recording completed successfully.

state_consistency.reason: State consistently reflects electrode issues, reattachment steps, and final successful recording.

workflow_compliance.reason: Expected workflow including electrode setup, signal monitoring, troubleshooting, and successful acquisition was followed.

task_completion.reason: ECG acquired successfully after electrode issue was resolved through systematic troubleshooting.
